reason: Parent issue #323 spawned this issue worker in its own branch and isolated worktree.

orchestrationDecisions.reason: The parent already consumed a runtime worker slot for this isolated mutation scope; inner roles inspect the same tightly coupled files sequentially and do not justify another mutating worktree.
Independent review audited tests, security, fixture truth, precedence, output closure, and resource correlation without mutating the worker branch.
The issue worker ran the coupled targeted and full repository gates after all review corrections; final review approved with no P0/P1.
